finding_results.notes: Roughened eight confession passages across lines 203-323. Pressure fractures now appear in at least six separate Tommy answers: restarts (203 'and I--', 303 'pulled him--I got him'), self-corrections (207 'His heel--the wet board, his heel just went', 221 'got--he got up'), abandoned clauses (241 'More than--no', 245 'He kept--', 253 'I pushed him--' and 'More like--', 265 'his goddamn--' and 'the whole--', 277 'stopped--at first', 323 'I don't even--'), and repeated wording with shifted meaning (265 'Twelve hours. Twelve hours and Cliff's already...'). At line 247, Mallick must re-prompt with 'And then what.' because Tommy stalls mid-answer at the hold-down sequence and cannot deliver it in one pass. Physical specifics (shove, beam hit, water depth, shoe staging) are fully preserved. No sanitization; profanity maintained and slightly intensified at line 265 ('A fucking folder in a dead man's safe').

summary: Single finding addressed: Tommy's confession dialogue roughened across eight passages to shift the dominant sub-mode from composed mini-narrative to pressure-fractured spoken recall. Six or more answer-turns now contain restarts, self-corrections, abandoned clauses, or shifted repetitions. One passage (the hold-down sequence) now requires a Mallick follow-up because Tommy cannot deliver it in one clean pass. All physical specifics, continuity details, and chapter structure preserved. Heading contract intact.
